custom.preconds: 1. User_1 created 2. Go to the store 3. Open sign-in form (Main page or Sign-in page)

step.content: 1. Click Forgot password link under Sign-in form
step.expected: 1. New page with reset password fields opens

step.content: 1. Check the page
step.expected: 1. Next elements are presented: - Title __Reset your password__ - Notification: We will send you an email with reset password instructions - Input e-Mail field (required) (e.g Mail_1 - existed) - Button Submit

step.content: 1. Enter mail of the User_1 2. Click the button Submit
step.expected: 3. Page opens with next presented element: - Title __Reset your password__ - Notification: We sent you a reset password link to your inbox. - Button Home page

step.content: 1. Go to the Mail_1 2. Check the mail
step.expected: 1. Mail with reset password link presented

step.content: 1. Open the link 2. Check the page
step.expected:
1. Next elements are presented:
- Title __Reset your password__ - Notification: Enter a new password - Password field(required) with eye icon - Confirm Password(required) with eye icon - Button Reset password - Tips for creating a strong password

step.content: 1. Go to Admin Environment> Open Notifications > Notifications activity feed 2. Open the last notification with a link 3. Open the link 4. Check the page
step.expected:
1. Next elements are presented:
- Title __Reset your password__ - Notification: Enter a new password - Password field(required) with eye icon - Confirm Password(required) with eye icon - Button Reset password - Tips for creating a strong password
![](index.php?/attachments/get/3d201956-3f18-484b-aa1c-8a94242e956d)

step.content: 1. Enter the password twice 2. Click button Reset password 3. Check the page
step.expected:
1. Next elements are presented - Title __Reset your password__ - Notification: Your password has been reset successfully
- Button Log in

step.content: 1. Click button Log in
step.expected: 1. Sign in form opens

step.content: 1. Try to login using a new password.
step.expected: 1. User_1 log in to the store 2. Dashboard page open

custom.preconds: 1. User_1 created 2. User_1 reached the RESET YOUR PASSWORD form

step.content: 1. Fill __Password__ + __Confirm password__ fields 2. Pay attention on the filling passwords symbols and Eye icons states
step.expected: 1. Passwords symbols invisible 2. Eye icons is not crossed out

step.content: 1. Click on the each Eye icons 2. Pay attention to the Passwords symbols and Eye icons states
step.expected: 1. Passwords symbols are visible 2. Eye icons is crossed out

step.content: 1. Click on the each Eye icons one more time 2. Pay attention to the Passwords symbols and Eye icons states
step.expected: 1. Passwords symbols invisible 2. Eye icons is not crossed out

step.content: 1. Insert hide symbols in the password field by CTRL + A or other way 2. Copy that by CTRL + C or other way 3. Paste it in the any field
step.expected: 1. Invisible password symbols not copied

step.content: 1. Make password symbols visible (Click on the Eye icon) 2. Insert this symbols by CTRL + A or other way 3. Paste it in the any field
step.expected: 1. Visible password symbols copied successful

case.title: Forgot password > error token or id

custom.preconds: 1. There is a registered user_1 2. Go to the story anonymously 3. Open sign-in form (Main page or Sign-in page) 4. Click Forgot password link under Sign-in form 5. Enter mail of the User_1 6. Click the button Submit 7. Go to Admin Environment > Open Notifications > Notifications activity feed 8. Open the last notification with a link

step.content: 1. Change the __Token__ from this link 2. Open the link 3. Check the page
step.expected: 1. Next elements are presented: - Title __Reset account password__ - Notification: token is invalid. - Button Home page

step.content: 1. Change the __Id__ from this link 2. Open the link 3. Check the page
step.expected: 1. Next elements are presented: - Title __Reset account password__ - Notification: User not found. - Button Home page

custom.preconds: 1. There is a registered user_1 2. Go to the story
custom.steps: 1. Open sign-in form (Main page or Sign-in page) 2. Click Forgot password link under the Sign-in form 3. Enter __any email__ that is not associated with any user_1. 4. Click **Submit**.
custom.expected: 1. There is no error message presented for a security reasons.

custom.preconds: 1. Go to the store 2. Open Forgot password form

step.content: 1. Leave __Email__ field empty 2. Click button Submit
step.expected: 1. Error message shows about required field Email.

custom.preconds: 1. Go to the store 2. Open Forgot password form

step.content: 1. Enter __Email__ with wrong data (for example without "@") 2. Click button Submit
step.expected: 1. Error message shows about incorrect email.

custom.preconds: 1. Go to the store 2. Open Forgot password form

step.content: 1. Enter 2 different __Passwords__ 2. Click Reset password
step.expected: 1. Error message shows about passwords not match each other.

custom.preconds: 1. Go to the store 2. Open Forgot password form 3. The rules of the policy may depend. Check the list or the rules before.

step.content: 1. Enter a Password which not follow the policy. 2. Click button Reset password
step.expected: 1. Error message shows about the Password must follow the Policy rules
